headline: Palantir Technologies (PLTR) Could Be 23% Below Fair Value On Split Valuation Views
summary: The U.S. Small Business Administration is entering a new phase of its anti-fraud initiative, using Palantir Technologies (PLTR) software to help identify, investigate, and support prosecutions tied to pandemic-era small business relief programs. See our latest analysis for Palantir Technologies. Against this backdrop of new government work, Palantir Technologies’ recent share price has been choppy, with the stock down about 21% year to date but supported by a very large 3 year total...
